brief: Tensions escalate over Strait of Hormuz as Trump renews blockade; Republicans return to Capitol amid Senator Graham's death. A tourist is hospitalized after bison attack at Yellowstone. Research on AI coding assistants and crime linkage analysis highlight human-AI interaction challenges.
news_summary: Trump reinstates naval blockade of Iranian ports and threatens tolls on Strait of Hormuz shipping, while Iran rejects US claims. On Capitol Hill, Republicans face a complicated agenda following the sudden death of Senator Graham. A man was tossed by a bison at Yellowstone, and a fatal ICE shooting in Maine sparks investigation.
papers_summary: Papers explore configurable AI coding assistants, behavioral probing in wearable sensing, and micro-level AI feedback in tutoring. Other studies cover crime linkage analysis, brain-computer interface clinical translation, and visual analytics for missing data.

en.brief: Tensions escalate over Strait of Hormuz as Trump renews blockade; Republicans return to Capitol amid Senator Graham's death. A tourist is hospitalized after bison attack at Yellowstone. Research on AI coding assistants and crime linkage analysis highlight human-AI interaction challenges.
en.news_summary: Trump reinstates naval blockade of Iranian ports and threatens tolls on Strait of Hormuz shipping, while Iran rejects US claims. On Capitol Hill, Republicans face a complicated agenda following the sudden death of Senator Graham. A man was tossed by a bison at Yellowstone, and a fatal ICE shooting in Maine sparks investigation.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore configurable AI coding assistants, behavioral probing in wearable sensing, and micro-level AI feedback in tutoring. Other studies cover crime linkage analysis, brain-computer interface clinical translation, and visual analytics for missing data.

zh.brief: A deadly bar fire in Bangkok and the death of US Senator Graham dominate headlines, while typhoon Bavi lashes China. Research papers explore AI coding tools and wearable sensing.
zh.news_summary: A bar fire in Bangkok kills at least 27, US Senator Lindsey Graham dies, and typhoon Bavi causes flooding in northern China. Also reported: a 'brain-eating' amoeba case in Taiwan and gender disparities in heat.
zh.papers_summary: No Chinese papers were listed, but English-language research includes studies on configurable AI coding assistants and behavioral probing in mandatory wearable sensing.

todays_image.caption: The bison's capture in the wild mirrors the man's arrest in Jordan.
todays_image.title: Bison bison
